__schema1.description: Identifier for the anomaly detection job. It can be a job identifier, a group name, a comma-separated list of jobs, or a wildcard expression. If you do not specify one of these options, the API returns information for all anomaly detection jobs.

__schema3.description: Specifies what to do when the request: 1. Contains wildcard expressions and there are no jobs that match. 2. Contains the _all string or no identifiers and there are no matches. 3. Contains wildcard expressions and there are only partial matches. If `true`, the API returns an empty `jobs` array when there are no matches and the subset of results when there are partial matches. If `false`, the API returns a `404` status code when there are no matches or only partial matches.
